package rulecoverage

func PositiveUnsafePointerCast() string {
    ruleID := "unsafe_pointer_cast"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`unsafe.Pointer` casts between incompatible types, particularly `uintptr` arithmetic followed by cast back to `unsafe.Pointer`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
